message:
feat(core): implement multipart/form-data parser with size limits

Add a complete multipart form data parser for handling file uploads:

- MultipartParser: streaming parser that splits multipart bodies
  on boundaries, extracting headers and content per part
- Part type: represents individual form fields or uploaded files
  with filename, content-type, and raw bytes
- UploadFile: high-level wrapper with read/seek semantics
- MultipartForm: container for parsed fields and files
- MultipartConfig: configurable per-file (10MB), total (50MB),
  and field count (100) limits with builder API
- MultipartExtractError: typed error for size/count violations
- parse_boundary(): extracts boundary from Content-Type header

Re-exports added to crate root for ergonomic access.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
